n: To Longo Burrow's Farm: Restocking the Pipeweed

steps.t: Longo Burrow's Farm is in Tookland, just south of Bywater in the Shire. You should run to the Longo Burrow's Farm and return with a basket of pipeweed…
Sperling Took, the supplier of the Farmers Faire, can be found in Bywater. You should return to Bywater as quickly as you can, taking bites of the pie…
